title: Modules, Packages, and Dependency Boundaries · Semantics Case: Dynamic Import
summary: Split the status coordinator into explicit browser modules and verify clean-environment loading and dependency behavior. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js dynamic import increment in a modular status application with a dependency record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use dynamic import for conditional capability or measured loading needs with complete error states.
Trace static module graph linking, live bindings, execution order, and cyclic dependency risks.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
